name: ibl-skill-improvement
description: IBL workflow for capturing, reviewing, and applying reusable improvements to agent skills.

interface.shortDescription: Capture and apply reusable skill improvements.
interface.longDescription: IBL Skill Improvement defines the inbox workflow used by agents to turn runtime skill failures into auditable, validated improvements against canonical skill sources.
defaultPrompt: Create an improvement artifact for the skill that failed.
Process the oldest skill improvement in the inbox.
